summary: Comprehensive testing of Type-A platform after major refactoring. All backend APIs (15 tests) passed. All frontend pages (Landing, Dashboard, Admin) render correctly with proper navigation and data display. Refactoring from monolithic to sub-components successful.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring completed successfully - AdminDashboard.jsx reduced from 885 to 252 lines
LandingPage.jsx reduced from 335 to 20 lines using sub-components
use-toast.js dependency array fixed from [state] to []
No console.log/console.error in production code - uses silenced logger
Note: 'Emergent' reference in page is from external script URL (https://assets.emergent.sh/scripts/emergent-main.js) which is preview environment infrastructure, not app branding
seed_data_creation: Admin data already seeded with 1000 customers, support tickets, and alerts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs: /api/, /api/dashboard/stats, /api/admin/stats, /api/admin/customers, /api/admin/alerts, /api/admin/tickets, /api/scans, /api/vulnerabilities, /api/components. Frontend pages: / (landing), /dashboard (scanner), /admin (admin console). Real Trivy scanning is working. 1000 customers seeded in MongoDB.

landing_page.hero_section: PASS - Start Scanning and How It Works buttons present

dashboard_page.sidebar: PASS - All tabs visible (Dashboard, Scan, Vulnerabilities, Components, Scan History)
dashboard_page.overview_tab: PASS - Stats cards and charts displayed
dashboard_page.scan_tab: PASS - Scan input and popular targets visible

admin_dashboard.sidebar: PASS - 4 views (Platform Overview, Customers, Support Tickets, Alerts)
admin_dashboard.overview_view: PASS - Metrics cards (Total Customers=1K, Monthly Revenue=$9.5M, Total Scans=2.4M, etc.)
admin_dashboard.customers_view: PASS - Table with pagination, filtering, sorting
admin_dashboard.customer_detail: PASS - Opens when clicking customer row
admin_dashboard.alerts_view: PASS - High-Risk Accounts and Critical Instance Health sections

branding.no_emergent_branding: PASS - Only reference is external script URL (infrastructure, not app branding)
branding.no_console_logs: PASS - Uses silenced logger in production
